brand.tagline: Open-source project management where AI agents and humans collaborate as equal Scrum teammates — self-hosted, fully customizable.

sandboxedAgents.title: Sandboxed AI Agents
sandboxedAgents.desc: Each agent runs in an isolated container — picking tasks from the board without touching your host environment.

bddSddHub.title: BDD & SDD Hub
bddSddHub.desc: Co-author Gherkin scenarios and System Design Docs with your whole team — humans and AI alike.

pluginMarketplace.title: Plugin Marketplace
pluginMarketplace.desc: Browse and install plugins from the UI. Customize everything via config and WASM plugins.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your workspace to continue.
login.adminManagedNote: Account access and password resets are managed by your administrator.

errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
errors.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

changePassword.secureAccountDesc: Your administrator has assigned you a temporary password. You must set a new personal password before you can access the workspace.
